title: Logistics Manager
description:
As a Logistics Manager, you will oversee and optimize the warehouse and supply chain operations, focusing on efficiency and alignment with business objectives. Collaborating closely with cross-functional teams including logistics, marketing, and sales, you will ensure seamless coordination to meet operational goals and customer requirements.

Responsibilities:

  • Strategically plan and manage logistics, warehouse, transportation and customer services.
  • Liaise and negotiate with suppliers, retailers and resolve any arising problems or complaints from customers.
  • Keep track of quality, quantity, stock levels, delivery times, transport costs and efficiency.
  • Optimize transportation routes and modes to minimize lead times and costs, ensuring on-time product delivery.
  • Arrange warehouse, catalog goods, plan routes and process shipments.
  • Implement effective warehouse management practices to streamline stock or inventory handling, storage, and order fulfillment processes for retailers and customers.
  • Able to meet cost, productivity, accuracy and timeliness targets.
  • Monitor market trends, customer demands, industry developments to implement best practices and innovative solutions to enhance supply chain efficiency.
  • Supervise, coach and train warehouse workforce for any issues or challenges that arise.

Requirements:

  • Bachelor's degree in supply chain management, Logistics, Business Administration, or any related field.
  • Minimum of 10 years of working experiences in logistics and supply chain management.
  • Excellent leadership and dynamic team player with the ability to motivate team, foster good relationships and collaboration, therefore achieving great outcomes and results.
  • Excellent communication skills with the ability to build relationships with customers and suppliers.
  • Strong decision-making skills, problem-solving skills.
  • Details-oriented, results-oriented, and good time management skills.

postedCompany.description:
Greenspade was founded in 2016 and is a startup comprising a small group of dynamic young people who love nature. Greenspade advocates green living in Singapore through promoting sustainable food waste initiatives, urban gardening practices and farming activities. We wish to bring nature a step closer to urbanised Singapore to make urban living sustainable, clean and green.

Greenspade aims to provide an online platform that offers a slew of organic fertilisers, soil and gardening products. Greenspade also provides landscaping installation/maintenance services such as tree transplanting and irrigation. Greenspade is a one-stop, easy-access platform for all green living supporters and nature lovers. Through this, we hope to make gardening easy and a joy to everyone.

If you wish to find out more about our products and services, please get in touch with us at enquiry@greenspade.sg or call +65 8869-8827.
postedCompany.name: GREENSPADE GLOBAL PTE. LTD.
